nonBlockingIssues.description: Stale doc comment at scene/lib.rs:966 references removed TextRun::glyph_count — should reference Glyphs content variant's glyph_count field
Glyphs rendering always uses ctx.mono_cache (hardcoded) and ignores font_size/axis_hash fields. Correct for current single-font prototype but will need updating for proportional/variable fonts
FillRect renders to full node bounds rather than clipped visible rect — minor overdraw inefficiency (clipped internally by fill_rect)
update_clock hardcodes advance=8u16 for monospace char width instead of using config parameter. Pre-existing behavior, not a regression

Stale SVG references remain outside feature scope: build.rs:120 comment says 'SVG rasterization', drawing/palette.rs:45-46 defines unused CHROME_ICON constant, test/tests/drawing.rs:4862 has stale SVG test comment. Pre-existing, not regressions

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md: compositor description changed from 'Owns glyph cache and SVG rasterizer' to 'Content-agnostic thin event loop — no font knowledge, no content dispatch, no SVG'. Content enum updated from Text/Image/Path to FillRect/Image/Glyphs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Remove stale SVG references from compositor description. AGENTS.md mentions 'compositor, SVG' and 'system/services/compositor/ — renderer, damage tracking, compositing, SVG'. After this milestone, the compositor has zero SVG knowledge. Also remove or mark as completed the 'Atomic removal' constraint ('PathCmd/PathCmdKind from scene, Path rendering + svg.rs from render, and SVG from compositor MUST be removed in one atomic commit') — this constraint was satisfied across the milestone's feature sequence and is now historical.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 4 reviews confirmed zero SVG/icon references in compositor. Grep for svg/Content::/icon_ in compositor returns zero matches.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Remove the IPC/Protocol Considerations entry about 'MSG_ICON_CONFIG / MSG_IMG_ICON_CONFIG in protocol crate — may need removal or update'. These messages were removed in the compositor-svg-removal feature (commit c9a73ea). The protocol crate no longer contains icon message types.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: compositor-svg-removal review confirmed: IconConfig struct and MSG_ICON_CONFIG/MSG_IMG_ICON_CONFIG constants removed from protocol crate.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update os-worker SKILL.md to (1) remove 'SVG → system/test/tests/svg.rs' from test file destinations, (2) update 'system/services/compositor/' description to remove SVG reference, (3) update render library description to remove SVG reference. Also consider adding guidance for 'hybrid refactoring features' where most work is done by prior features but new implementation remains — the skill's binary TDD/refactoring distinction doesn't cover this case well.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 4 reviews flagged stale SVG references in os-worker skill. core-scene-migration worker noted the hybrid case in skillFeedback.suggestedChanges.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md Content enum design section accurately documents new Content variants — no action needed
rejectedObservations.reason: Positive confirmation, not an actionable observation

rejectedObservations.observation: No .factory/library/ directory exists for this project
rejectedObservations.reason: .factory/library/ does exist with 10 files including architecture.md. The reviewer's observation was incorrect — they may have checked at the wrong path
